next_safe_steps.read_only: Use repository inspection, issues or PR metadata before any mutation.
next_safe_steps.draft_only: Prepare a draft PR or draft issue proposal for human review.
next_safe_steps.sandbox_write: Use a non-production branch or fork only after explicit approval.

next_safe_steps.read_only: Use exported workflow JSON or read-only API first.
next_safe_steps.draft_only: Generate or review workflow JSON offline before any live binding.
next_safe_steps.sandbox_write: Keep workflow creation blocked until a sandbox workspace and explicit approval exist.

next_safe_steps.read_only: Review inbox or draft content without sending anything.
next_safe_steps.draft_only: Prepare a draft reply for human review; do not send from Atlas.

next_safe_steps.read_only: Inspect files and metadata before any write path.
next_safe_steps.draft_only: Prepare document changes or folder plans for human review.

next_safe_steps.read_only: Inspect sheet structure or exported data first.
next_safe_steps.draft_only: Prepare row mappings or formulas offline before any write path.

next_safe_steps.read_only: Review availability and event metadata first.
next_safe_steps.draft_only: Draft event changes for human confirmation before any calendar mutation.

next_safe_steps.read_only: Keep Chrome DevTools MCP as manual opt-in and prefer --no-usage-statistics if configured later.

next_safe_steps.draft_only: Prepare deployment notes or a release checklist before any live deploy.

next_safe_steps.read_only: Inspect the workspace surface before any write path.
next_safe_steps.draft_only: Prepare file change plans or diffs for review.
next_safe_steps.sandbox_write: Restrict writes to the governed workspace or a sandbox directory only.

next_safe_steps.read_only: Inspect schema or sample records first.
next_safe_steps.draft_only: Prepare SQL or migration drafts for human review without execution.

next_safe_steps.read_only: Start with read-only inspection until platform-specific safety posture is defined.
next_safe_steps.draft_only: Prepare a draft plan or payload before considering any mutation.
